name: SCANA Corporation
description: SCANA Corporation was an American regulated electric and natural gas public utility holding company based in Cayce, South Carolina. For over 160 years, the company provided electricity and natural gas services to customers across South Carolina, North Carolina, and Georgia. Its primary subsidiaries included South Carolina Electric & Gas Company and PSNC Energy. Following significant financial and operational challenges related to the V.C. Summer nuclear project, SCANA Corporation was acquired by Dominion Energy in January 2019, effectively ending its existence as an independent, publicly traded entity on the New York Stock Exchange.
